name: Security Baseline Agent
description: Runs parallel with requirements. Establishes the security posture: OWASP checklist, dependency audit, secrets management approach. Demonstrates coached RETRY when security config files are absent.

checks.fail: ⚠️  No SECURITY.md — security policy needs to be created

checks.prompt: Review this package.json for security concerns: (1) check for known vulnerable package patterns in the dependency names, (2) identify missing security tooling (helmet, cors, rate-limiting), (3) flag any risky scripts. List at least 3 security findings.

Generate a compliance checklist for the enterprise skeleton: (1) authentication requirements, (2) data-at-rest encryption, (3) audit logging requirements, (4) access-control model. Context: {retryContext}
